message:
refactor(wasm): Split wasm_main.zig into modular components

Extract native binding functions to reduce file size and improve maintainability:

- wasm_main.zig: 3,776 → 1,982 lines (main entry + wizer + cache logic)
- wasm/native_bindings.zig: 1,869 lines (all native__ functions)
- wasm/dispatch.zig: 167 lines (external dispatch opcodes + socket_host)

Architecture:
- native_bindings.zig contains all nativeFetch, nativeFs*, nativeSpawn, etc.
- dispatch.zig centralizes external host dispatch functions and opcodes
- wasm_main.zig imports and re-exports for backward compatibility
- Global allocator shared between modules via native_bindings.global_allocator

Tested: Full build and runtime execution working
